summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Thryve Coworking Management System. Fixed critical bug in management routes (dependency injection issue). All 31 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI tests for Members, Room Bookings, Support Tickets, and Announcements all working correctly.
passed_tests: Plans API - Get all plans, verify default rates (40k/55k/8k/6k/500)
Meeting Rooms API - Get all rooms, verify rates (CR-1: 1000/hr, MR-1/MR-2: 500/hr)
Members API - Create with plan, custom rate, discount, update, delete
Bookings API - Check availability, create booking, conflict detection, cancel
Tickets API - Create with category/priority, update status, resolve
Frontend - Members page loads, add member with plan selection works
Frontend - Room Bookings page shows all rooms with correct rates/slots
Frontend - Booking creation with member selection and credits tracking
Frontend - Support Tickets page with create/view/status update
Frontend - Announcements page with create/pin functionality

bugs_fixed.issue: Dependency injection bug - Depends(lambda: get_current_user) was returning function reference instead of calling it
bugs_fixed.fix: Created proper async wrapper function get_current_user() that calls the injected auth function correctly
bugs_fixed.impact: All POST/PUT/DELETE endpoints in management routes were returning 500 Internal Server Error

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Meeting room credits system working correctly (credits deducted on booking)
Rate calculation with custom rates and discounts working correctly
Pinned announcements appear at top as expected
seed_data_creation: Default plans and meeting rooms are seeded on startup. Plans: Private Cabin 4-seater (40k), 6-seater (55k), Open Desk (8k), Hot Desk (6k), Day Pass (500). Rooms: CR-1 (10 seats, 1000/hr, 60min), MR-1/MR-2 (5 seats, 500/hr, 30min)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Management system fully implemented and tested. All CRUD operations for Members, Bookings, Tickets, and Announcements working. Meeting room credits are tracked in minutes. Booking conflicts are properly detected. Ticket numbers are auto-generated (THR-TKT-XXXX). Pinned announcements appear at top of list.
